prompt: Navigate to https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.txt in Safari and save the file to ~/Downloads/gpl-3.0.txt. You may use Safari's File > Save As or Develop > User Agent + Right-click > Download Linked File. As a deterministic fallback, cerebellum 'safari download https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.txt ~/Downloads/gpl-3.0.txt' is acceptable.
